'''Guron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]]. He was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|racer]] who met [[Meetra Surik]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] in [[3951 BBY]].
